hero.title: Support ECAA
hero.description: Help ECAA build a stronger, more resilient, and mortgage-free community future.

donationCampaign.title: Unlocking Our Community's Future: Mortgage-Free and Thriving
donationCampaign.description: Support ECAA's community programs, services, and long-term community initiatives through the fundraising campaign.
donationCampaign.ctaDescription: Donation payments are handled securely through Jotform. Your gift supports ECAA programs, services, and community growth.

otherOptions.title: Other Ways to Support ECAA
otherOptions.description: Membership, volunteering, hall rentals, and direct contact are other meaningful ways to support ECAA.

closingNote: Contact ECAA for questions about donations, fundraising, sponsorship, and volunteer opportunities.
